_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-008 (DG, cosine: 0.387), SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.383).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.1/10 (raw 0.211). Shared vocabulary: [operational]. DCWF-only terms [contribute, cyberspace, opords, orders] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.828 (P=0.828, R=0.829). Balanced P/R — the 6-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Contribute to cyberspace Operational Orders (OPORDs)." and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.399 > STS 0.211 (gap +0.187). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [operational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.0%. Shared tokens: [operational]. DCWF-only: [contribute, cyberspace, opords, orders]. WIDAI-only: [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.187 with low STS 0.211. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
